# Cache Attributes

**API Collection**

Attributes for the texture cache.

## Constants

- **kCVOpenGLESTextureCacheMaximumTextureAgeKey**: By default, textures will age out after one second. Setting a maximum texture age of zero will disable the age-out mechanism completely. The [doc://com.apple.corevideo/documentation/CoreVideo/CVOpenGLESTextureCacheFlush(_:_:)] function can be used to force eviction in either case.
